title: Founder's Associate
must_haves: Work directly with founders amplifying their bandwidth across product, sales, community, ops, research, hiring
Apply via CV + short note to careers@tryspecter.com (£42k-£77k)
hard_blockers: No per-role direct URL found on an ATS (apply-by-email role) — cannot confirm exact live listing page; tryspecter.com careers/Notion-style hub, not a standard ATS posting
Listing geography/seniority not fully verifiable from a canonical posting
met_strengths: Founder's Associate at Minima (worked directly with founders 4+ yrs, seed->Series A)
Cross-functional ownership across fundraising, ops, GTM, community — exactly the listed surface area
Builds AI agents with Claude Code (agentic fluency)
Community-led growth track record ($4.5m presale 15x ROI, 100k community)
one_line_verdict: Near-ideal founder-associate generalist fit (prior FA + community-led GTM + agentic building); only risk is many strong applicants and email-only apply — not a degree/SWE/visa gate.
fetch_note: AI Specter = tryspecter.com / specter.careers (recruitment-rebellion platform), careers@tryspecter.com, £42-77k London FA per WebSearch. The 'specter' Ashby slug is a DIFFERENT company (SF aerospace/hardware) and 'spector-ai' is a Bengaluru ML co — neither is this role. No canonical per-role URL surfaced; apply by email.
